pi_items.source: Direct query of official Chinook SQLite database: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Customer UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Employee
Direct SQL query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Customer on official Chinook database (github.com/lerocha/chinook-database)
Direct SQL query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Employee on official Chinook database (github.com/lerocha/chinook-database)
Task setup script confirms this path is used to restore and access the database (task_utils.sh:96, setup_task.sh:12)
Environment installation script (install_libreoffice_base.sh) downloads from official Chinook repository with fallback URLs

privileged_info_summary: The Chinook database contains exactly 59 customers and 8 employees, totaling 67 records. The data is sourced from the official Chinook database repository (github.com/lerocha/chinook-database), a well-known public sample database representing a digital media store. The task requires merging Customer and Employee records into a unified Person table in LibreOffice Base using HSQLDB embedded database.
